frames.description: A street view from a moving vehicle in a narrow commercial area. On the left, there's a purple building with a lottery stand. On the right, storefronts are visible including one with a red 'vi DESIGNS MOBILE CARE' sign. Pedestrians and motorcycles are seen further down the road. Infrastructure includes concrete buildings and overhead electrical wires. Signs: 'Lottery' (ലോട്ടറി) and 'vi DESIGNS MOBILE CARE'.

The camera moves closer to a mobile shop on the right. A prominent blue sign reads 'SAMSUNG Galaxy' and 'DESIGNS MOBILE CARE, PALAKKAD'. The Malayalam text reads 'ഡിസൈൻസ് മൊബൈൽ കെയർ പാലക്കാട്'. A motorcycle is visible on the left edge.

The scene shows two shops: 'BABU STATIONARY' on the left with a large 'MEDIMIX' advertisement, and 'GOLDEN BAZAR' on the right. The sign for Golden Bazar states 'ALL VARIETY RICES CANDYS DRY FRUITS SPICES'. A person on a motorcycle is in the foreground. Signs: 'BABU STATIONARY' (ബാബു സ്റ്റേഷനറി) and 'GOLDEN BAZAR'.

Continuing down the street, passing 'GOLDEN BAZAR'. The next shop is 'M.R. STORE OIL MERCHANT'. Sacks of goods and fresh vegetables are piled outside. Signs: 'MR STORES OIL MERCHANT' and 'M.R. STORE OIL MERCHANT' (എം ആർ സ്റ്റോഴ്സ് ഓയിൽ മെർച്ചന്റ്).

A bakery called 'Vinayaka BAKES' is featured, with a sign showing food and drink items. Next to it is 'R. Sivan PLANTAIN LEAF MERCHANT'. The bakery sign mentions 'Big Bazaar, Palakkad'. Signs: 'Vinayaka BAKES' (വിനായക ബേക്സ്, വലിയങ്ങാടി, പാലക്കാട്) and 'R. Sivan PLANTAIN LEAF MERCHANT'.
A side view as the vehicle passes the plantain leaf shop. Bunches of green bananas are seen hanging inside the shop area next to a yellow pillar.

The camera captures 'M.K STATIONARY' with a large signboard displaying various household products. Bananas hang on the left side of the frame. The sign reads 'M.K STATIONARY, Valiyangadi, BigBazaar Road, Palakkad'.

Passing 'KRC COCONUT MERCHANT Wholesale & Retail'. People are visible inside the store. To the right, a red and white 'Eastern' brand sign is partially visible. Sign: 'KRC COCONUT MERCHANT' (വലിയങ്ങാടി പാലക്കാട് - 14).

A large 'Eastern' sign for a general merchant is seen on the left. To its right is 'SRI AMMAN VEGETABLES'. Signs: 'Eastern' (കെ. ഷൺമുഖ മൂത്താൻ സൺ ജനറൽ മെർച്ചന്റ്) and 'SRI AMMAN VEGETABLES' (ശ്രീ അമ്മൻ വെജിറ്റബിൾസ്).
A focused view of 'SRI AMMAN VEGETABLES' with various produce on display. A motorcycle passes in the foreground. The Malayalam sign reads 'ശ്രീ അമ്മൻ വെജിറ്റബിൾസ്'.

The camera passes 'C. SAMOO IYER & SONS', which advertises 'PRINCE ATTA • MAIDA • SOOJI'. Sacks of produce are stacked inside the shop. Sign: 'C. SAMOO IYER & SONS' (സി. സാമു അയ്യർ ആന്റ് സൺസ്, വലിയങ്ങാടി, പാലക്കാട്).

The scene shows 'SM GARLIC & ONION MERCHANT KRISHNA TRADERS'. Baskets of garlic are visible in the foreground. The sign reads 'SM GARLIC & ONION MERCHANT KRISHNA TRADERS' (എസ് എം വെളുത്തുള്ളി ഉള്ളി വ്യാപാരി കൃഷ്ണ ട്രേഡേഴ്സ്, വലിയങ്ങാടി, പാലക്കാട് - 14).
The camera moves past the garlic and onion merchant, showing an adjacent storage space filled with sacks. The building has a traditional tiled roof.
Passing old, weathered buildings. A blue shuttered shop is visible on the right. A man in a blue checkered shirt appears in the distance.
A close-up of the street side as the vehicle moves forward. A man in an orange shirt and face mask is visible in the bottom left corner.
A man in a blue checkered shirt is standing on the street. Behind him is a dilapidated, partially collapsed building with exposed wooden beams and a tiled roof.
Continuing to pass the man in the blue shirt and the collapsed building. The perspective shifts slightly as the vehicle moves.
A slightly further perspective of the man in the blue shirt and the ruined structure.
The vehicle moves further, with the collapsed building now more central in the frame.
The camera maintains focus on the man and the ruins as the vehicle passes by.
Similar view to the previous frame, continuing the slow movement past the site.
The man in the blue shirt is now on the left side of the frame as the camera passes him.
The camera is now almost directly in front of the collapsed portion of the building.
The ruins of the building are seen on the right, showing rubble and broken wood.
The camera begins to move past the collapsed building, revealing a more modern structure adjacent to it.
An auto-rickshaw appears in the foreground, partially obstructing the view of the buildings on the right.
The camera captures 'A. GOPALAKRISHNAN LEMON MERCHANT'. A man on a motorcycle with a helmet is visible on the right. Sign: 'A. GOPALAKRISHNAN LEMON MERCHANT' (എ. ഗോപാലകൃഷ്ണൻ ചെറുനാരങ്ങ വ്യാപാരം).
Final frame showing a clear view of the 'A. GOPALAKRISHNAN LEMON MERCHANT' sign and an yellow auto-rickshaw on the right. The sign also mentions 'Big Bazar, Palakkad-14'.
